title: Minimal Horse Armor
description: Show off your beautiful horse, give it boots
body:
![Four different horses in a row. Each has a saddles and a different set of armor.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/609a1c87dd023bd3e9d7f89993d8db083fcb02d0.png)

Give your horse boots! Show off your horse while still being able to see what armor it has on
